---
title: "Molecular Machine Learning & Generative Discovery"
subtitle: "AI-guided molecular generation, drug-target interaction, and therapeutic discovery"
description: "BioMIND research on molecular machine learning, drug-target interaction prediction, molecular generation, diffusion models, and AI-assisted drug discovery."
---

## Overview

This area focuses on **molecular machine learning**, drug-target interaction prediction, molecular generation, diffusion models, and computational methods for drug discovery and therapeutic design. BioMIND researchers develop **interpretable and generative AI methods** that support virtual screening, molecular design, target-specific molecule generation, and AI-guided biomedical discovery.

## Example themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Drug-target interaction prediction
Graph-based, attention-based, and NLP-inspired models for predicting compound–protein interactions.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Molecular representation learning
Geometric and graph neural networks that respect molecular structure and symmetries.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Graph-based molecular learning
Message passing, equivariant networks, and structure-aware models for property prediction and design.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Structure-based drug design
AI methods that leverage protein binding-site structure for compound design.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Diffusion models for molecule generation
Best-of-K alignment, Best-of-N sampling, and structure-conditioned generation.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Bias mitigation in biomedical datasets
Ensemble and balancing methods to mitigate real-world bias in DTI and similar tasks.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Interpretable molecular AI
Attribution, attention, and concept-based explanations for molecular predictions.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-assisted drug discovery
End-to-end pipelines combining prediction, generation, and prioritization.
:::

:::

## Example projects

- [**AttentionSiteDTI**](../publications/index.qmd) — interpretable graph-based DTI prediction with NLP-style relation classification
- [**UnbiasedDTI**](../publications/index.qmd) — deep ensemble-balanced learning for bias-aware DTI prediction
- [**BoKDiff**](../publications/index.qmd) — Best-of-K diffusion alignment for target-specific 3D molecule generation
- [**BindingSite-AugmentedDTA**](../publications/index.qmd) — binding-site-aware drug repurposing pipeline

## Current student projects

Current BioMIND student projects in this area include **motif-constrained molecular diffusion**, **molecular representation learning**, and **AI-enabled molecule generation**. See the [Students](../people/students.qmd) page for current researchers and the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page for posters, submissions, and manuscripts in preparation.

## Related faculty

- [Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay) — MoML / Human-CAIR
- [Niloofar Yousefi](../people/faculty.qmd#niloofar-yousefi) — AI-AIR

## Representative publications

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page for the full list. Several flagship molecular ML papers are highlighted under *Selected Publications*.
